extraction.description: This screenshot shows the escalation configuration panel in UiPath Agent Builder, specifically the Assignment, Inputs, and Outcome behavior sections of an escalation tool. The escalation is assigned to a user named Sergey User, and several input arguments are defined, including in_Reasoning with a custom description. The outcome behavior is configured so Submit continues execution and StopExecution ends execution.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the Recipient field under Assignment, select or confirm the user Sergey User.
2. In the Inputs section, locate the in_Reasoning argument and in its Description field, enter: "Briefly explain the steps taken up until escalation".
3. In the Outcome behavior section, set Submit to Continue.
4. Set StopExecution to End.
